2605.05940.title: Near-Policy: Accelerating On-Policy Distillation via Asynchronous Generation and Selective Packing
2605.05940.paper_summary: Standard knowledge distillation for autoregressive models often suffers from distribution mismatch. While on-policy methods mitigate this by leveraging student-generated outputs, they rely on computationally expensive Reinforcement Learning (RL) frameworks. To improve efficiency, we propose Near-Policy Distillation (NPD), an asynchronous approach that decouples student generation from training. This reformulation enables Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) with sequence packing. However, asynchronous updates inevitably introduce policy lag and sample noise, which can cause the behavior to drift from near-policy toward off-policy. To counteract this without sacrificing efficiency, NPD integrates sparse student updates and the $Δ$-IFD filtering mechanism, a heuristic sample selection mechanism that empirically stabilizes the optimization trajectory. By filtering extreme out-of-distribution samples, $Δ$-IFD prevents noise from dominating the gradients, ensuring updates remain within a safe proximal learning zone. Empirically, the NPD framework achieves a 8.1x speedup over on-policy baselines and outperforms SFT by 8.09%. Crucially, by effectively narrowing the exploration space for subsequent RL, our method enables openPangu-Embedded-1B to reach a state-of-the-art score of 68.73%, outperforming the substantially larger Qwen3-1.7B. Codes will be released soon.
2605.05940.paper_summary_zh: 標準知識蒸餾對於自回歸模型通常會遭遇分佈不匹配的問題。雖然在政策上的方法透過利用學生生成的輸出來減輕這一問題，但它們依賴於計算成本高昂的強化學習（RL）框架。為了提高效率，我們提出了近政策蒸餾（NPD），這是一種非同步的方法，將學生生成與訓練解耦。這一重新定義使得能夠進行帶序列打包的監督微調（SFT）。然而，非同步更新不可避免地引入了政策延遲和樣本噪聲，這可能導致行為從近政策漂移到非政策。為了在不犧牲效率的情況下對抗這一問題，NPD整合了稀疏的學生更新和$Δ$-IFD過濾機制，這是一種啟發式樣本選擇機制，經驗上穩定了優化軌跡。通過過濾極端的分佈外樣本，$Δ$-IFD防止噪聲主導梯度，確保更新保持在安全的近端學習區域內。根據實驗，NPD框架在政策基準上實現了8.1倍的加速，並且在性能上超過了SFT 8.09%。關鍵是，通過有效縮小後續RL的探索空間，我們的方法使openPangu-Embedded-1B達到了68.73%的最先進得分，超過了大得多的Qwen3-1.7B。代碼將很快發布。
2605.05940.author: Miao Rang et.al.
2605.05940.authors: Miao Rang, Zhenni Bi, Hang Zhou, Kai Han, Xuechun Wang, An Xiao, Xinghao Chen, Yunhe Wang, Hanting Chen
